values.value: [Auto] Severity set to MEDIUM. Escalates to HIGH when conditions are LIFR or when more than 8 inbound flights are affected. Read the current METAR and any TAF forecast covering the next 2 hours. Note whether conditions are improving or deteriorating. Check for related cases: are inbound flights diverting or holding? If yes, link those cases via `related_runbooks` references. [Auto] Customer notification is drafted for the site's customer region (West Coast or East Coast). Notification includes current flight category and TAF-derived expected duration.
